content.text:
Scenario: Coach Food Company is meeting to discuss its current challenges. In this session, their goal is to analyze the company’s poor financial performance.Respond to the question: Describe the purpose for this meeting.
Purpose (Key Vocabulary to Use): analyze, financial, performance
Suggested Sentence Structure: The purpose of this meeting is to…
情境描述：教練食品公司正在召開會議，以討論當前面臨的挑戰。在本次會議中，他們的目標是分析公司財務表現不佳的原因。
回答問題：描述這次會議的目的。
目的（需使用關鍵詞）：分析、財務、表現
建議句型： 這次會議的目的是…
content.assessment_standard:
10	The purpose of this meeting is to analyze the company’s financial performance. The team will discuss their current challenges and examine their recent problems. They hope to find the causes of their problems and discuss solutions. They will also consider plans to improve their performance in the future.|This meeting was scheduled to evaluate the company’s financial situation. Their recent performance was not as good as they expected, so the team needs to discover the main problems. Also, by analyzing their current challenges, they hope to make better business decisions. Their main purpose is to improve their efficiency.|The purpose of this meeting is to review and analyze the company’s financial performance. The team will examine data on their sales and on current challenges. They want to find the causes of their problems and discuss possible solutions. The meeting will help set new goals for improvement.
9	The purpose of this meeting is to analyze the company’s financial results. The team will look at recent performance to see what went wrong. They want to understand the situation and talk about how to fix it.|This meeting is about checking the company’s financial condition. Some parts of the performance are not going well. The team will analyze the data and think of ways to improve it.|The company called this meeting to talk about its financial performance. The team will review the problems and try to find a solution. They want to make things better for the next quarter.
8	This meeting is to analyze the company’s financial performance. The numbers are not good. The team wants to talk about how to fix it.|The company has a meeting to check its financial report. The performance is going down. The team needs to make a plan.|This meeting is about money problems. The company wants to know why the performance is low. They will talk about it together.
7	This meeting is for the company’s financial problem. The team wants to talk. They will find a way to fix it.|The company wants to check the money. The performance is not good. They have a meeting to talk.|Meeting is about financial performance. It is going down. The company wants better.
6	Meeting is for financial problem. Company want fix. It no good now.|Company talk money. Performance not good. They not happy.|This meeting check problem. Financial go down. Company no do well.
5	Company talk money. It not good. Meeting check.|Performance bad. They talk report. Company want make better.|Meeting is finance. I no understand. They look problem.
4	Financial meeting. Team talk. Not go well.|Company performance. Fix now. No good money.|Analyze report. It problem. Team worry.
3	Meeting today. Money bad.|Financial down. Team talk. Not okay.|Company problem. No good. Meeting.
2	Has problems.|Talk report.|Company… bad. Check?
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question: Talk about the different challenges that Coach Food Company is facing.
Challenges (Key Vocabulary to Use): consumer preferences, market competition, rising costs
Suggested Sentence Structure: One of the biggest challenges that the Coach Food Company is facing is…because…
回答問題：談談教練食品公司目前面臨的不同挑戰。
挑戰（需使用關鍵詞）： 消費者偏好、市場競爭、成本上升
建議句型：教練食品公司目前面臨的最大挑戰之一是…
content.assessment_standard:
10	One of the biggest challenges that the Coach Food Company is facing is rising costs. The prices for materials, packaging, and delivery are going up. This makes it harder for the company to make a profit. With strong market competition and changing consumer preferences, the company needs to work harder to stay in business.|A major issue that the Coach Food Company is dealing with is market competition. Many new companies are selling similar products at lower prices or with faster service. It’s also hard to lower prices because of rising costs, and consumer preferences are changing too. This makes it difficult to keep customers.|One big challenge is changing consumer preferences. People now want healthier and more convenient food. The company has to update its products to match what customers want. But at the same time, rising costs and strong market competition make it harder to change quickly.
9	One of the biggest challenges that the Coach Food Company is facing is rising costs. This makes it harder to earn profit and compete in the market. Consumer preferences and market competition also make the situation more difficult.|I think market competition is the biggest problem right now. Other companies are offering similar products at lower prices, and rising costs make it hard to lower prices. The company also needs to follow new consumer preferences to keep customers.|A major issue is changing consumer preferences. People now want healthier and faster food, so the company must improve its products. But rising costs and strong market competition make this harder to do.
8	Rising costs are a big problem for Coach Food Company. They also face strong market competition, and consumer preferences are changing. These things make it harder to keep good business.|Coach Food Company has trouble with market competition because other companies sell similar food for less money. Rising costs and new consumer preferences make it hard to stay popular.|One challenge is consumer preferences. People want fresh and healthy food now. But rising costs and market competition make it hard for the company to change fast.
7	Rising costs make things more expensive. The company spend more money. Consumer and market also make problems.|Market competition is very strong. Other companies have low price. Rising costs and consumer preferences make it hard to sell.|Consumer preferences are changing. People wants new food that is more healthy. The company must change but it’s not easy.
6	Rising costs is hard. They need pay more money. It big problem.|Market is strong now. Too many other companies. They lose customers.|Consumer preferences change. People want new kind food. Company need do something.
5	Rising costs go up. Company spend more. Hard to stay good.|Market competition is strong. Other company cheap. Hard to win.|Consumer preferences change. People like new food. Company try.
4	Rising costs problem. No make money.|Many company. Sell same thing.|Customer change. People want different.
3	Rising costs bad. No money.|Markets is strong. Lose sales.|Customer change. Hard follow.
2	Rising costs.|Market. Big.|People change.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question: Discuss the proposed solutions to meet these challenges.
Proposed Solutions (Key Vocabulary to Use): adjustment, invest, discount
Suggested Sentence Structure: To solve the problem, the company will…
回答問題：討論應對這些挑戰的解決方案。
解決方案（需使用關鍵詞）： 調整、投資、折扣
建議句型：為了解決這個問題，公司將…
content.assessment_standard:
10	To solve the problem, the company will adjust its prices and offer discounts to attract more customers. They will invest in new technology to improve efficiency. This will reduce costs and help them stay competitive. The company aims to enhance customer service and product quality.|The company will invest in better equipment to increase efficiency. They will adjust their product offerings to meet customer preferences. The company will also offer discounts to increase sales. These solutions will help improve performance.|To improve its financial situation, the company will adjust its marketing strategy to be more efficient and less wasteful. Additionally, they will offer discounts to attract customers. They will also invest in advertising to raise brand awareness. This will help the company stay competitive and meet customer needs.
9	To solve the problem, the company will lower prices and offer discounts to attract customers. They will invest in new tools to improve efficiency and reduce costs. This will help the company increase sales.|The company plans to improve efficiency by investing in new equipment. They will offer discounts to make their products more attractive. These steps will help increase customer interest and sales.|To improve performance, the company will invest in better technology. They will also adjust prices and offer discounts to attract more customers. These solutions will help the company stay competitive.
8	The company will offer discounts and adjust prices. They will improve efficiency to save costs. This will help them attract more customers.|The company plans to offer discounts and adjust prices. They want to work faster to reduce costs. This will keep them competitive.|The company will offer discounts and change prices. They will improve efficiency to save money. This should help increase sales.
7	The company change prices. They give discounts to attract more people. This will help sales grow.|The company will work faster. They want to save money by being more efficient. Discounts will help bring customers.|Marketing is very need now. The company want tell more people. This help get more sales.
6	The company adjust prices and invest. Discounts help more.|Company invest in machines. They adjust work to be fast.|Company will adjust products. Discounts make food cheaper.
5	Company do adjustment. Change plan. Try again.|They invest. Buy something new. Help company.|Give discount. People happy. Maybe buy more.
4	Company adjustment. Change some.|They invest. Maybe help.|They give discount. People buy more.
3	Company change. Good.|Invest. Maybe fix|Discount more. Cheap.
2	Adjustment.|Invest.|Discount.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question: Tell us about the different ways the Company plans to implement the solutions.
Implementation Plans (Key Vocabulary to Use): strategy, promotion, discount
Suggested Sentence Structure: To [implement solution], the company will [specific action] by [detailed step].
回答問題：請說明公司計劃如何用不同的方式執行解決方案。
解決方式（需使用關鍵詞）： 策略、推廣、提案
建議句型：為了執行[解決方案]，公司將透過[具體行動]來[詳細步驟]。
content.assessment_standard:
10	To address the issue, the company will launch a promotion offering discounts on selected products. This will attract more customers and increase sales. Additionally, they plan to invest in new machinery and manufacturing methods. This will improve production efficiency and reduce costs, helping them stay competitive.|In response to the challenges, the company will introduce a new marketing strategy. They will promote their products through targeted discounts to boost customer interest. To support this, they will invest in upgrading production tools, improving both speed and quality. These solutions will make the company more financially stable.|To improve performance, the company will run a promotion that includes discounts on key products. They will also invest in better technology to increase efficiency and reduce costs. Finally, they will develop a strategy to expand their business. These changes will help the company meet its goals and grow in a competitive market.
9	The company will focus on improving sales by launching a promotion with special discounts. They plan to invest in better equipment to increase efficiency and cut costs. These strategies will help them stay competitive in the market.|To solve the problem, the company will begin a promotional campaign to offer discounts. They will also invest in new technology that will help streamline production and reduce costs. This plan will help boost their position in the market.|The company will promote their products with discounts as a way to attract more customers. At the same time, they will invest in improving their production processes. This will help reduce costs and improve overall efficiency.
8	To increase sales, the company will offer discounts on popular items. They will invest in new equipment to make production faster and more efficient. These actions will help reduce costs.|To boost sales, the company plans to use promotions to attract more customers. They will invest in tools to make production more efficient. This will help the company lower its costs.|The company will use discounts as part of a promotion to attract new customers. They will also invest in better tools to speed up production. These steps will help improve efficiency and reduce costs.
7	The company will use discounts promote their products. They will invest in tools to make work faster. This will helping them to save money.|To attract customers, the company will offering discounts. They will also invest in equipment to help reduce production time. This will lower cost.|The company will run a promotion to offer discounts. They will invest in new tools to work more faster and cheaper. This will help save money.
6	Company change strategy. They invest in promotion. This help grow.|Company will make discount. Invest in promotion. Make sales more.|They use strategy. Adjust promotion. Help company grow.
5	Company do strategy. Change plan. Make people buy.|They use strategy. Make promotion work.|Give discount. People like. Try promotion.
4	Strategy change. Maybe help sales.|Make promotion. Help grow.|Promotion work. Help sell. Save.
3	Strategy make. Help.|Invest in promotion. Grow.|Give discount. More buy.
2	Strategy.|Save money.|Work fast.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question: You have an opportunity to travel abroad. What do you need to prepare before you go?
回答問題: 如果你有機會出國旅行，在出發前你需要準備什麼？
content.assessment_standard:
10	Before traveling abroad, I need to prepare important documents like my passport, visa, and travel insurance. I also research the country’s laws, weather, and culture so I can plan better. Packing the right clothes and items for the trip is another key step. With everything ready, I can travel with more confidence and fewer problems.|One important preparation is booking flights and accommodations early. I also exchange some local currency so I can pay for things when I arrive. Making copies of my ID and keeping emergency contacts is also useful. These steps help me stay safe and organized during the trip.|I usually start by checking the entry requirements for the country, like COVID rules or visas. Then, I plan my itinerary and make sure I have enough money for the trip. I pack based on the weather and activities I want to do. Preparing in advance helps me enjoy the trip without stress.
9	I need to prepare my passport and visa before I go abroad. It’s also important to pack clothes and things I will need for the trip. I check the country’s rules and weather before leaving.|Before traveling, I book my flight and hotel. I also bring travel documents and check if I need insurance. These things help me travel safely.|I check what the country needs, like visa or health forms. Then I get money and plan what to do there. It’s better to prepare so I don’t have problems.
8	I prepare my passport and visa because I cannot travel without them. I also bring money in case I need to buy something. These are important for the trip.|I usually book my flight and hotel first. Then I check the weather and pack my clothes. This helps me travel more easily.|I write a travel plan before I go abroad. I choose places to visit and think about how to get there. This makes the trip more organized.
7	I bring my passport and maybe visa. These are need for the airport. I take them first.|I book the flight and hotel. Then I check weather. It help me know what to bring.|I write a list before travel. I plan where to go and what to do. It makes my trip better.
6	I bring passport and visa. These are for travel. I pack them first.|I book hotel and plane. Then I check weather. I pack right clothes.|I plan the trip. I write where to go. I check places online.
5	Bring passport. It for travel. I take it.|I book hotel. I buy ticket. It help travel.|Make plan. Write where go. For trip.
4	Bring passport. For travel. Very need.|Book ticket. Hotel later. Travel ready.|Make plan. Go places. Write list.
3	Passport. For travel.|Book hotel. Help trip.|Plan trip to go.
2	Passport.|Hotel.|Plan.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question: What can you learn from traveling abroad?
回答問題: 你可以從出國旅行中學到什麼？
content.assessment_standard:
10	Traveling teaches you about different cultures and ways of life. When I visit a new country, I learn how people live, what they eat, and how they celebrate. These experiences help me become more open-minded and respectful. It’s also a great way to understand the world better.|One thing I learn from traveling is how to solve problems. Sometimes there are delays, language issues, or complications with transportation. These situations teach me to stay calm and think quickly. I become more confident and flexible.|Traveling helps me learn about myself. When I leave my comfort zone, I discover what I enjoy, what I fear, and how I react to new things. It’s a personal journey, not just a physical one. I grow each time I travel somewhere new.
9	Traveling helps me understand different cultures and lifestyles. I learn what people eat, how they speak, and how they live. It makes me more open to new ideas. I think this is very valuable in today’s world.|I learn how to be more independent when I travel. Sometimes I face problems like missing a train or getting lost. I must stay calm and fix the situation. These moments help me grow.|Traveling teaches me more about myself. I feel excited and nervous when I go somewhere new. I learn what I enjoy and what makes me uncomfortable. It’s a good way to grow as a person.
8	I think traveling helps me learn about different cultures. I can try new food and see how people live. It makes me more open to other ways. I like learning this way.|Traveling teaches me how to face problems. I may miss a bus or get lost. I need to stay calm and find a way. It helps me become stronger.|I learn about myself when I travel. I find out what I like or don’t like. I try new things and meet people. It is a good way to grow.
7	Traveling shows me new culture. I see how people live. It is interesting for me.|I learn to fix problems. Sometimes I get lost. I find the way back.|I know myself more from travel. I see what I like. It help me grow.
6	I learn culture. People eat different food. I see their life.|I learn to fix problems. Sometimes get lost. I find the way.|Travel help me know myself. I try new things. I feel brave.
5	I learn culture. People do different. I see.|I get lost. I find way. I learn it.|I travel. Try new thing. Know myself.
4	Learn culture. Travel see. Different.|Lost. Find way. Problem fix.|Try new. Brave. Know myself.
3	Culture good. Travel see.|Get lost. Fix it.|Try new. Different.
2	People.|Lose, find.|Try thing.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question: Which country would you like to visit? Why would you like to go there?
回答問題: 你最想去哪個國家? 為什麼你想去那裡?
content.assessment_standard:
10	I would love to visit Japan because it offers a fascinating mix of modern life and ancient tradition. From high-tech cities like Tokyo to peaceful temples in Kyoto, every region has something unique. I’m especially excited to experience the cherry blossom season and try authentic Japanese cuisine. Traveling there would be both exciting and educational.|The country I most want to visit is the United Kingdom, mainly because of its rich history and culture. I’ve always been fascinated by British literature and landmarks like Big Ben and the Tower of London. I’d also like to explore small towns and countryside areas to get a deeper understanding of daily life there. It feels like a place where the past and present come together beautifully.|I’ve dreamed of traveling to Canada because of its breathtaking natural scenery and multicultural cities. I want to visit national parks like Banff and visit the Rocky Mountains. I would also like to spend time in cities like Toronto or Vancouver. I think Canada would offer a balance of adventure and cultural learning, which makes it a perfect travel destination for me.
9	I would like to visit Japan because I enjoy its culture and food. Cities like Tokyo and Kyoto have both traditional and modern attractions. I think traveling there would be exciting and educational.|The country I want to visit is the United Kingdom. I’m interested in its history and famous landmarks like Big Ben. I also want to experience the culture I’ve read about in books.|I want to travel to Canada for its nature and peaceful lifestyle. I’d like to visit the national parks and see the mountains. It looks like a relaxing and beautiful place to explore.
8	I want to visit Japan for its cities and temples. The cherry blossoms and food are also exciting. It’s a great mix of culture and fun.|I would visit the United Kingdom for its history and landmarks like Big Ben. I also want to explore small towns.|Canada’s nature is beautiful, and I want to see its national parks. It looks like a peaceful place to visit.
7	I want to visit Japan. There are big cities like Tokyo, and I like temples. The cherry blossom look nice.|The United Kingdom is interest to me. I want to see places like Big Ben. I also want to visit the countryside.|Canada have beautiful nature. I want to see mountains and parks. It seem like a peaceful country.
6	I like go Japan. Tokyo big. I see temples, good food.|UK is nice. Big Ben famous. I want visit there.|Canada nice. I like nature. I see parks and mountains.
5	I go Japan. Food good. I want see Tokyo.|UK is nice. Big Ben is famous. I like visit.|Canada good. I want see parks. I go there.
4	Japan. Food good. See Tokyo.|UK. Big Ben. Many places.|Canada. Parks nice. See mountains.
3	Japan good. Food nice.|UK. Big Ben.|Canada nice. Mountains.
2	Japan.|UK.|Canda.
1	(No response / Silence)
